PATIENT_ID: TEST_CAUTI_NOCATH_003
ARRIVAL_TIME: 2026-01-15 08:00:00

[PHYSICIAN_NOTE] 2026-01-17 10:00:00
Patient reports dysuria and urinary frequency.
Urinalysis positive for WBCs.
Suspected simple urinary tract infection — no catheter in place.
Started on antibiotics.

[LAB] 2026-01-17 11:00:00
Urine culture positive for E. coli > 10^5 CFU/ml.
